Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
13 
DAYS_SUPLY_NUM 
LABEL: 
Days Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the number of days' supply of medication dispensed by the pharmacy and consists 
of the amount the pharmacy enters for the prescription. 
SHORT NAME: DAYSSPLY 
LONG NAME: DAYS_SUPLY_NUM 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
Possible values are 0–999. 
COMMENT: 
CMS accepts
